name: DigiCert
description: This app uses the DigiCert automation API to manage ssl certificates

parameters.name: csr
parameters.description: Vault_id OR vault_name of the certificate signing request (csr)

parameters.name: common_name
parameters.description: Certificate common name (default: extracted from csr)

parameters.name: signature_hash
parameters.description: The certificate's signing algorithm hash (default: extracted from csr)

parameters.name: server_platform
parameters.description: Server platform this certificate is for

parameters.name: order_validity
parameters.description: How long the order should be valid for (in years, max 6)

actions.name: Update Request Status
actions.description: Update the status of a request (i.e. approve the request)

parameters.name: request_id
parameters.description: The request id of a certificate request to update

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Status to set for the order

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Add comment to the order request that we update (optional)

actions.name: Download Cert
actions.description: Download a certificate to the vault

parameters.name: order_id
parameters.description: The order id to download the certificate for

actions.name: Get Request Info
actions.description: Get details for a certificate request
